questions.title: Taints, tolerations, and NoExecute scheduling repair
questions.question:
A Deployment named `taint-api` in namespace `taints-lab` is not scheduling onto the intended tainted node pool.

Fix the workload so that:
- it targets nodes labeled `workload=ops`
- it tolerates the taint `dedicated=ops:NoExecute`
- the toleration keeps `tolerationSeconds: 60`
- the Deployment becomes Available on an `ops` node

Do not remove or change the taint on the node. Fix the workload scheduling configuration instead.
